title: rubus × pseudohebecaulis
intro: Rubus × pseudohebecaulis, also known as pseudohebecaulis raspberry or hybrid raspberry, is a cross between the European raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the Japanese raspberry (Rubus akane). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues due to its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Rubus × pseudohebecaulis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive system function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to leverage its medicinal and health benefits.
